label: Depth Chart
description: Market depth visualisation showing cumulative bid and ask volume across price levels.

0.6.note: added !isContextComplete loading guard (animate-pulse spinner text) before data render — was missing, now pass.

0.7.note: Empty guard: bids.length===0 && asks.length===0 returns 'No depth data' — pass.

0.8.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper covers render errors — pass.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx — pass. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=["execution-basic","execution-full"] — pass. 0.3 availableOn=["terminal"] — pass. 0.4 No any/ts-ignore — pass. 0.5 No lib/mocks imports — pass. 0.6 FIXED: added !isContextComplete loading guard (animate-pulse spinner text) before data render — was missing, now pass. 0.7 Empty guard: bids.length===0 && asks.length===0 returns 'No depth data' — pass. 0.8 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper covers render errors — pass. 0.9 No dead code — pass.

1.1.note: Data read via useTerminalData() — bids, asks, livePrice, selectedInstrument, isContextComplete all from TerminalDataProvider — pass.

1.2.note: terminal-data-context is provided by use-terminal-page-data.ts which calls useGlobalScope() at line 107 and filters instruments/strategies by scope — pass.

1.3.note: Org filter: useGlobalScope context.organizationIds used in isContextComplete and strategy filtering in use-terminal-page-data.ts — pass.

1.4.note: Client filter: context.clientIds used in isContextComplete — pass.

1.5.note: Strategy filter: context.strategyIds filters filteredStrategies in use-terminal-page-data.ts — pass (depth chart displays bids/asks not strategies but the context properly handles it).

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays: isMockDataMode() returns true when no scope, otherwise context returns unfiltered when arrays empty — pass.

1.7.note: No reference data in lib/mocks in widget file — pass.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data read via useTerminalData() — bids, asks, livePrice, selectedInstrument, isContextComplete all from TerminalDataProvider — pass. 1.2 terminal-data-context is provided by use-terminal-page-data.ts which calls useGlobalScope() at line 107 and filters instruments/strategies by scope — pass. 1.3 Org filter: useGlobalScope context.organizationIds used in isContextComplete and strategy filtering in use-terminal-page-data.ts — pass. 1.4 Client filter: context.clientIds used in isContextComplete — pass. 1.5 Strategy filter: context.strategyIds filters filteredStrategies in use-terminal-page-data.ts — pass (depth chart displays bids/asks not strategies but the context properly handles it). 1.6 Empty scope arrays: isMockDataMode() returns true when no scope, otherwise context returns unfiltered when arrays empty — pass. 1.7 No reference data in lib/mocks in widget file — pass.

findings: L0 0.6 FIX: Added !isContextComplete loading guard — was missing before; now shows 'Loading depth data…' with animate-pulse when terminal context is not yet ready.
L1: All checks pass. Data exclusively from useTerminalData(); terminal-data-context backed by use-terminal-page-data.ts which correctly reads useGlobalScope() and filters by scope.
